name: Satay Kuah Sauce (Spicy Peanut Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the outer layer from lemon grass and remove tough tops (save for soup stock if desired). Chop tender stalks into 1-inch lengths.
2. In a food processor, combine chopped lemon grass, shallots, garlic, coriander, hot chili sauce, cumin seeds, and turmeric. Process until a fine paste forms, adding water as needed.
3. Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium heat. Add the lemon grass paste and dried shrimp paste, stirring until aromatic, about 4 minutes.
4. Stir in half of the coconut milk and continue cooking, stirring almost constantly, for another 8 minutes.
5. Add the remaining coconut milk, sweeten with brown sugar, and season with salt. Mix well.
6. Blend in the roasted peanuts. Taste and adjust sweetness, saltiness, and heat level as desired. Thin with additional coconut milk or water if needed.
